title: Classical and Quantum Gravity
body:
Classical and Quantum Gravity is a peer-reviewed journal that covers all aspects of gravitational physics and the theory of spacetime.
The editor-in-chief is Susan Scott at the Australian National University. The journal's 2023 impact factor is 3.6 according to Journal Citation Reports. As of October 2015, the journal publishes letters in addition to regular articles.
categories: Articles with outdated impact factors from 2023
